title: Christmas Cards Boxed Red Card | 30 Pack Xmas Cards Multipack | 6 Unique Christmas Tree Star Bauble Designs Festive Seasons Greetings For Friends Family
features: Introducing our exquisite pack of 30 Christmas Cards, the perfect embodiment of holiday cheer and heartfelt wishes. Measuring 105mm x 148mm, each card is a canvas of joy, designed to spread the magic of the season.

Within this splendid collection, you'll discover a set of 30 cards, thoughtfully divided into 6 distinct and endearing designs. The design of this pack focuses on a classy Christmas!. We have 6 unique designs this year, including Christmas Baubles, a Star, a Christmas Tree, Presents and a Festive Garland. Each card features the words MERRY CHRISTMAS on the inside.

Completing this delightful ensemble are 30 red envelopes, the perfect companions to house these tokens of affection. Whether destined for family, dear friends, workmates, or neighbours, these cards transcend boundaries, making them an ideal gesture of appreciation and connection.

Crafted with care and creativity, each card is designed and printed in the UK. The attention to detail is evident not only in the charming imagery but also in the selection of premium materials. To keep your cherished cards organized and at the ready, a convenient storage box is included, ensuring that if you don’t use them all up this year, you can keep them safely until next year.

In a world where digital messages often dominate, these Christmas cards offer a tangible way to share your heartfelt sentiments. Embrace the joy of giving and the tradition of spreading Christmas wishes with this impeccable pack of 30 Christmas Cards.
